CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration In Support Of Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment as to Defendant Bordner Home Improvement Compansy.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:23 a.m. and concluding at 9:32 a.m.

Plaintiff Buyerlink Inc., A Deleware Corporation appearing represented by Tanya Schierling, Esq. via Zoom.
Witness for Plaintiff Tatevik Dayttyan appeared via zoom.
Defendant Bordner Home Imnprovement Company not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff Tatevik Daytyan and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Buyerlink Inc., A Deleware Corporation and against Defendant Bordner Home Improvement Company as follows:

Damages: $50,558.05
Prejudgment Interest: $7,534.40
Attorney Fees: $2,250.00
Costs: $964.85
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $61,307.30

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration In Support Of Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-23-2025 Continued To Jun-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter;

Plaintiff Buyerlink Inc., A Deleware Corp. appearing represented by Tanya M. Schierling Esq. appearing via Zoom Video Conference.

Defendant Bordner Home Improvement Company not appearing.

Counsel requests a continuance as her witness is not available for this hearing.

Matter is continued to Jun 27, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
